one_liner: Reducto is an agentic document platform for parsing, extracting, splitting, and editing files (PDFs, images, spreadsheets, etc.) via API.

auth_methods.notes: API key generated in Reducto Studio, passed as Bearer token in Authorization header or set as REDUCTO_API_KEY environment variable

self_serve_notes: Self-serve account creation and API key generation in Reducto Studio. New users receive 15,000 credits one-time onboarding allotment, then usage-based pricing at $0.015 per credit. Startups may qualify for additional production credits.

api_surface.notes: REST API with endpoints for parse, extract, split, edit, classification, and upload. SDKs available for Python, Node.js, and Go. Base URL: https://platform.reducto.ai. Supports 30+ file formats including PDFs, images, spreadsheets, presentations, and documents.

evidence.supports: API key authentication with Bearer token, REST API base URL, SDK availability for Python/Node.js/Go, supported file types and endpoints
API key authentication via REDUCTO_API_KEY environment variable, SDK methods for parse, extract, split, upload
Self-serve access, 15,000 credits one-time onboarding allotment, $0.015 per credit pricing, startup credit eligibility
MCP server exists with both hosted (https://mcp.reducto.ai/mcp) and local deployment options, supports document processing workflows
